name: Anonymous Causal SCM Benchmark
description: Synthetic finite Boolean structural-causal-mechanism benchmark for evaluating causal mechanism induction from interventional observations.
rai:dataCollection: Synthetic benchmark instances generated from finite Boolean structural causal mechanisms.
rai:dataUseCases: Evaluation and stress testing of causal mechanism induction systems.
rai:dataLimitations: Synthetic finite Boolean SCMs are controlled stress tests and should not be interpreted as real-world causal discovery datasets.
rai:personalSensitiveInformation: The dataset does not contain personal or sensitive information.
rai:annotation: Gold mechanisms and held-out outcomes are generated by the benchmark construction pipeline.
